effects.name: Initiative Proficiency
effects.description: When you roll Initiative, you can add your Proficiency Bonus to the roll.

effects.name: Initiative Swap
effects.description: Immediately after you roll Initiative, you can swap your Initiative with the Initiative of one willing ally in the same combat. You can't make this swap if you or the ally has the Incapacitated condition.

effects.name: Two Cantrips
effects.description: You learn two cantrips of your choice from the Cleric, Druid, or Wizard spell list. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for this feat's spells (choose when you select this feat).

effects.name: Level 1 Spell
effects.description: Choose a level 1 spell from the same list you selected for this feat's cantrips. You always have that spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have.

effects.name: Spell Change
effects.description: Whenever you gain a new level, you can replace one of the spells you chose for this feat with a different spell of the same level from the chosen spell list.

name: Savage Attacker
description: You've trained to deal particularly damaging strikes.

effects.name: Savage Attacker
effects.description: Once per turn when you hit a target with a weapon, you can roll the weapon's damage dice twice and use either roll against the target.

name: Skilled
description: You gain proficiency in any combination of three skills or tools of your choice.

effects.name: Proficiencies
effects.description: You gain proficiency in any combination of three skills or tools of your choice.

effects.name: Ability Score Increase
effects.description: Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.

effects.name: Punch and Grab
effects.description: When you hit a creature with an Unarmed Strike as part of the Attack action on your turn, you can use both the Damage and the Grapple option. You can use this benefit only once per turn.

effects.name: Attack Advantage
effects.description: You have Advantage on attack rolls against a creature Grappled by you.

effects.name: Fast Wrestler
effects.description: You don't have to spend extra movement to move a creature Grappled by you if the creature is your size or smaller.

name: Archery
description: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls you make with Ranged weapons.

effects.name: Archery
effects.description: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls you make with Ranged weapons.

name: Defense
description: While you're wearing Light, Medium, or Heavy armor, you gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class.

effects.name: Defense
effects.description: While you're wearing Light, Medium, or Heavy armor, you gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class.

name: Great Weapon Fighting
description: When you roll damage for an attack you make with a Melee weapon that you are holding with two hands, you can treat any 1 or 2 on a damage die as a 3. The weapon must have the Two-Handed or Versatile property to gain this benefit.

effects.name: Great Weapon Fighting
effects.description: When you roll damage for an attack you make with a Melee weapon that you are holding with two hands, you can treat any 1 or 2 on a damage die as a 3. The weapon must have the Two-Handed or Versatile property to gain this benefit.

name: Two-Weapon Fighting
description: When you make an extra attack as a result of using a weapon that has the Light property, you can add your ability modifier to the damage of that attack if you aren't already adding it to the damage.

effects.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
effects.description: When you make an extra attack as a result of using a weapon that has the Light property, you can add your ability modifier to the damage of that attack if you aren't already adding it to the damage.

effects.name: Ability Score Increase
effects.description: Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

effects.name: Peerless Aim
effects.description: When you miss with an attack roll, you can hit instead. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until the start of your next turn.

effects.name: Ability Score Increase
effects.description: Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

effects.name: Blink Steps
effects.description: Immediately after you take the Attack action or the Magic action, you can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

effects.name: Ability Score Increase
effects.description: Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

effects.name: Improve Fate
effects.description: When you or another creature within 60 feet of you succeeds on or fails a D20 Test, you can roll 2d4 and apply the total rolled as a bonus or penalty to the d20 roll. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you roll Initiative or finish a Short or Long Rest.

effects.name: Ability Score Increase
effects.description: Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 30.

effects.name: Overcome Defenses
effects.description: The Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage you deal always ignores Resistance.

effects.name: Overwhelming Strike
effects.description: When you roll a 20 on the d20 for an attack roll, you can deal extra damage to the target equal to the ability score increased by this feat. The extra damage's type is the same as the attack's type.

effects.name: Ability Score Increase
effects.description: Increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 30.

effects.name: Free Casting
effects.description: Whenever you cast a spell with a level 1-4 spell slot, roll 1d4. If the number you roll is the same as the slot's level, the slot isn't expended.

effects.name: Ability Score Increase
effects.description: Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

effects.name: Merge with Shadows
effects.description: While within Dim Light or Darkness, you can give yourself the Invisible condition as a Bonus Action. The condition ends on you immediately after you take an action, a Bonus Action, or a Reaction.

effects.name: Shadowy Form
effects.description: While within Dim Light or Darkness, you have Resistance to all damage except Psychic and Radiant.

effects.name: Ability Score Increase
effects.description: Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30.

effects.name: Truesight
effects.description: You have Truesight with a range of 60 feet.
